title: Dr. Kildare's Wedding Day
writer: Willis Goldbeck, Harry Ruskin, Ormond Ruthven
actors: Lew Ayres, Lionel Barrymore, Laraine Day
plot: A week before Dr. Kildare's wedding to Nurse Mary Lamont, the hospital bustles with wedding plans. Dr. Gillespie helps a conductor restore his hearing, then tragedy occurs.
